items.headline: Scam messages offering ships safe transit through Hormuz, security firm warns
items.summary: Fraudsters are targeting shipping companies stranded near the Strait of Hormuz, offering safe passage in exchange for cryptocurrency payments, according to risk firm MARISKS, which confirmed the messages are scams.
